title: Unhinged Goose
description: Adds geese and things that goose do to Minecraft.
body:
![Unhinge_goose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f84ed9dbf29e1c318d9fc06a17d16496ec61bd9b.png)

Mod in progress,
 ### What the goose does?
> The goose is a neutral mob
> 
> If you get near of a goose's child the goose gonna give you 3 alerts, if you don't go away the goose will start hitting you
> 
> Once dead, the goose drops feather and goose wings, when you eat the wings this gonna let you goose bones (for the moment the goose bones are useless)
### WHAT I WILL ADD NEXT?
- A nether goose with the 2 variants
- Potions
- A mini boss fight with the nether goose if you want it
- You could tame the nether goose

Sorry for the delay in uploading versions, I'm just one person working on the whole project and I also have a lot of things to do IRL because I'm still a student
